svg.title: Manufacturing issue resolution — high-level architecture
svg.desc: Multi-tier block diagram: Plant Manager UI at top, FastAPI backend and IoT Simulator in the second tier, LangGraph orchestrator bar in the third, three AI agents (Scanner, Investigator, Technician) in the fourth, data stores and outputs in the fifth, and memory guardrail badges at the bottom.
svg.text: Plant manager UI — Vite · React · Shadcn · TypeScript

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Describe the Sensor Stream Panel component and its SSE hook')
sendPrompt('Describe the Pipeline Status Stepper component')
sendPrompt('Describe the Action Plan panel and the Human Approval gate UI')
sendPrompt('Describe all FastAPI backend endpoints in the system')
sendPrompt('Describe the IoT sensor simulator and its anomaly injection profiles')

g.text: LangGraph orchestrator · thread-isolated per run_id · PostgreSQL checkpointer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Scanner agent: its rules engine, LLM prompt, and batch token guardrail')
sendPrompt('Explain the Investigator agent: RAG retrieval, confidence scoring, and KB token guardrail')
sendPrompt('Explain the Plant Technician agent: CAPA, shift handoff, PDF generation, and approval gate')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in this system? Cover the audit log and checkpointer tables')
sendPrompt('What documents are seeded into the Pinecone vector database and how are they retrieved?')
sendPrompt('How is the PDF action plan generated using ReportLab?')
sendPrompt('How does the human-in-the-loop approval gate work? What requires approval before action?')
sendPrompt('Explain the batch token cap guardrail in the Scanner agent')
sendPrompt('Explain the KB context budget guardrail in the Investigator agent')
sendPrompt('What are the max_tokens settings for each of the three agents?')
sendPrompt('How does the PostgreSQL LangGraph checkpointer provide crash recovery?')
sendPrompt('How does thread isolation per run_id prevent state bleed between concurrent incidents?')
